title: Warptech
description: A Create addon made to bring balanced forms of teleportation to Create!
body:
**THIS MOD IS GOING THROUGH A MAJOR REWORK, WHICH WILL TAKE TIME. THE NEW VERSION WILL NOT WORK WITH THE OLD VERSION.**

THIS MOD IS CURRENTLY JUST A PROOF OF CONCEPT- EXPECT TO NOT WORK WITH UPDATE 1.0 AND BEYOND

Create: Warptech aims on bringing balanced forms of teleportation to the Create mod.
Currently, the mod is in a beta state and so far only adds one form of teleportation; Stargates!

**IT IS HEAVILY RECCOMENDED TO PLAY WITH A FE MOD OF YOUR CHOOSING AS STARGATES REQUIRE FORGE ENERGY**


Very few recipies are implimented as of now, but I intend on adding them soon after a short break. This mod took a while and I hope it gets enjoyed- and I am proud to boast that this is the only mod that adds block-built, vanilla-style Stargates.

This mod, as of now, adds Stargate- inspired in function by the tech from the movie and show of the same name;
What these do is allow the player to link two points in space- intra or inter-dimensionally, and- as long as these two points are loaded- connect the two to allow for instant travel across them- but keep in mind that these are one way- and watch out for the kawoosh :]

A demonstration of manual Stargates:
[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JenwKs38HjU](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JenwKs38HjU)
 

Create and Geckolib are required.

 
_
There are tags for which biomes can generate the default and nether style gates- I suggest looking at these for modpacks._
